subcodes.first_line: O thou who art imbibing from the brimming chalice in the tavern of Bahram, offer the sweet draught unto the companions, that they may partake of the nectar and rejoice perpetually in the realms of existence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش از باده آماده در میکده بهرام یارانرا بنوشان تا نوشا نوش در جهان و
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation, @music and singing
